JUDGE:TOMAR MASON/CLERK:ECLVERIA/RPTR:LORETTA NAJERA NOTE: THIS CASE WAS FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MORGAN PRICKETT BUT PARTIES WANTED THAT THE CASE BE PUT ON RECORD BEFORE JUDGE MASON, SO MR. PRICKETT AND BOTH PARTIES (DENNIS HYDE,APPEARING FOR PLFF, AND BOTH DEFTS PRESENT) WERE ALL IN DEPT. 1 BEFORE JUDGE MASON, TO ENTER THE STIPULATION, AS CONTAINED IN THE JUDGMENT ENTITLED "JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIOPULATION AND DEFAULT". ALSO, A DEFAULT HAD BEEN ENTERED ON DEFT ANGENORA COLLINS ON 1/29/97 BUT SHE IS PRESENT TODAY WITH HER HUSBAND-CO-DEFT EDDIE COLLINS TERMS OF STIPULATION ENTERED ON RECORD.
